ogTitle: McIntosh Creek vs Meadowbrook: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in McIntosh Creek and Meadowbrook.
heading: McIntosh Creek vs Meadowbrook — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between McIntosh Creek, Queensland and Meadowbrook, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: McIntosh Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Meadowbrook (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is McIntosh Creek or Meadowbrook safer from flooding?
faq.answer: McIntosh Creek has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Meadowbrook scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: McIntosh Creek scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Meadowbrook scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in McIntosh Creek or Meadowbrook?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. McIntosh Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
